ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c ), "Completed")|| ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c ), "Unqualified")) && ISCHANGED(Status__c ) && ($Profile.Name != "System Administrator" ) && ($Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps" ) && ($Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps Extended" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot change status when meeting is completed. Please contact SalesOps for further assistance.
